name: destak-publicidade
description: Plataforma de gerenciamento de publicidade sonora para comércio local

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.setup: cd backend && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push && node prisma/seed.js
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd audio-service && uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000"
